testcase.name: test_create_natural
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v3_mavis.py:157: in test_create_natural assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Não consegui extrair lembrete da frase"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_intent_reminder_create

skipped.message: smart_extract não extraiu lembrete: {'error': "Não entendi o lembrete. Tente: 'me lembra de X amanhã às 8h'."}

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_v3_mavis.py:251: smart_extract não extraiu lembrete: {'error': "Não entendi o lembrete. Tente: 'me lembra de X amanhã às 8h'."}

testcase.name: test_intent_fallback_route

failure.message: AssertionError: esperava 35 km. Got: Falha no cérebro neural: 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED. {'error': {'code': 429, 'message': 'You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. To monitor your current usage, head to: https://ai.dev/rate-limit. \n* Quota exceeded for metric: generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests, limit: 5, model: gemini-2.5-flash\nPlease retry in 7.748812266s.', 'status': 'RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED', 'details': [{'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.Help', 'links': [{'description': 'Learn more about Gemini API quotas', 'url': 'https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits'}]}, {'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.QuotaFailure', 'violations': [{'quotaMetric': 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests', 'quotaId': 'GenerateRequestsPerMinutePerProjectPerModel-FreeTier', 'quotaDimensions': {'location': 'global', 'model': 'gemini-2.5-flash'}, 'quotaValue': '5'}]}, {'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.RetryInfo', 'retryDelay': '7s'}]}} assert '35' in "Falha no cérebro neural: 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED. {'error': {'code': 429, 'message': 'You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. To monitor your current usage, head to: https://ai.dev/rate-limit. \\n* Quota exceeded for metric: generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests, limit: 5, model: gemini-2.5-flash\\nPlease retry in 7.748812266s.', 'status': 'RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED', 'details': [{'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.Help', 'links': [{'description': 'Learn more about Gemini API quotas', 'url': 'https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits'}]}, {'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.QuotaFailure', 'violations': [{'quotaMetric': 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests', 'quotaId': 'GenerateRequestsPerMinutePerProjectPerModel-FreeTier', 'quotaDimensions': {'location': 'global', 'model': 'gemini-2.5-flash'}, 'quotaValue': '5'}]}, {'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.RetryInfo', 'retryDelay': '7s'}]}}"
